Michael Johnson
Charlotte, NC

Summary
Dedicated and hardworking dock worker with over 1 year of experience in freight handling and warehouse operations. Possess a strong ability to lift heavy loads and operate forklifts safely and efficiently. Committed to maintaining a safe work environment and ensuring timely shipment of goods.

Experience
Dock Worker  
ABC Freight Solutions, Charlotte, NC  
June 2022 - Present  
- Operate forklifts to load and unload freight from trucks and containers, ensuring safety protocols are followed.  
- Collaborate with team members to ensure efficient processing of incoming and outgoing shipments.  
- Assist in maintaining inventory accuracy through regular checks and updates.  
- Lift and move freight weighing up to 75 lbs repeatedly throughout the shift.

Warehouse Associate  
XYZ Logistics, Gastonia, NC  
March 2021 - May 2022  
- Responsible for sorting and organizing freight in the warehouse.  
- Assisted in loading and unloading trucks, ensuring all items were handled with care.  
- Utilized hand trucks and pallet jacks to move heavy items as needed.  
- Maintained cleanliness and organization of the work area to promote safety.

Certifications  
- Forklift Operator Certification, OSHA compliant, 2021
